core_mechanism: resonant field-driven coupling of a two-body free (continuum) state into a single selected discrete bound eigenstate, with state selectivity set by tuning the drive frequency to that target eigenstate's energy (a continuum-to-bound resonance)
brief_reason: The molecules are formed 'via a single photo-association step' from free laser-cooled atoms and specific rovibrational levels are selectively produced, which is exactly a frequency-tuned resonant transition binding two colliding free constituents into one chosen discrete bound state.
